name: Memory Helper
description: On-demand search and recall across Switchbay memory stores (user context, SWITCHBAY.md, workspace notes/facts, knowledge index, pins, sessions, plans). Use instead of stuffing large memory into every turn.

tools.name: search_memory
tools.description: Search Switchbay memory stores and return ranked hits with source, path, score, and snippet. Use to discover where something was remembered.

query.description: What to search for in memory.

workspace.description: Absolute project root. Defaults to SWITCHBAY_WORKSPACE or the process cwd.

tools.name: recall_memory
tools.description: Recall the best-matching memory as a compact context_pack plus structured facts. Use when you need usable content for the current turn.

workspace.description: Absolute project root. Defaults to SWITCHBAY_WORKSPACE or the process cwd.

limit.description: Max items in the context pack. Default 8.
